rooms.name: bedroom-bed
rooms.desc:
You are sitting on your soft and comfy bed. 
But, you do not have any sleep intention at the moment.

rooms.name: bedroom-door1
rooms.desc: There is a locked door heading to the west.

rooms.name: bedroom-door2
rooms.desc: There is a slightly opened door heading to the east.

rooms.name: corridor1
rooms.desc: A long corridor with 4 pictures with large frames hanging on the wall.

rooms.name: corridor2
rooms.desc: A long corridor with 4 magnificent portraits of the current empire's royal family.

rooms.name: castlecenter-hall
rooms.desc: This is the place where you usually greet your father, the king.

rooms.name: castlecenter-throne
rooms.desc: The place where the king usually sits at. Numerous sparkling jewels filled the old-looking chair.

rooms.name: castle-storage1
rooms.desc:
An old storage room that stores various equipments. 
You found a shiny black pearl, with a long sword resides beside it.

rooms.name: castle-storage2
rooms.desc:
An old storage room that stores various equipments. 
You found a black key and flashlight that are still usable.

rooms.name: library-entrace
rooms.desc:
This is the entrace of an unknown library. 
There seems to be a person guarding the entrace.

rooms.name: library-corridor
rooms.desc:
The corridor of the library with a wall made of bricks. 
There seems a brick that has a hidden text.

rooms.name: library-hall
rooms.desc:
A hall with a lot of books. 
There is a mechanism in the east side of the room. 
You need a password to unlock it. 
Tips: use "unlock <direction>" command

rooms.name: library-bedroom
rooms.desc:
A simple bedroom, yet feel warm. 
You feel that you have been here before.

rooms.name: library-mainroom
rooms.desc: A place where the old man is usually sitting to read book.

rooms.name: library-jail
rooms.desc:
A jail with minimum ventilation and lighting. 
It is prominent that your sister has been locked up here for a long time.

rooms.name: warehouse-bedroom
rooms.desc: A simple bedroom the duke has made for you. The door to the north side is locked.

rooms.name: warehouse-toilet
rooms.desc: A toilet that has stinky smell.

rooms.name: warehouse-hall
rooms.desc: The main hall of the warehouse. It seems that many battles have happened here before.

rooms.name: house-center
rooms.desc: The center of the house. There seems to be a passage down.

rooms.name: house-north
rooms.desc: The north room of the house. There lies the black turtle statue.

rooms.name: house-east
rooms.desc: The east room of the house. There lies the azure dragon statue.

rooms.name: house-south
rooms.desc: The south room of the house. There lies the phoenix statue.

rooms.name: house-west
rooms.desc: The west room of the house. There lies the white tiger statue

rooms.name: house-underground
rooms.desc: The underground section of the house. It seems that Bhu usually do his activities here

rooms.name: heaven-hall
rooms.desc: The hall of the Heaven Realm. Sparkles flowing around.

rooms.name: heaven-library
rooms.desc: The library of the heaven. There is a book about how to revive the ancient beasts.
